name: ats3-lsp-resident
description: Resident in-process ATS3 LSP server (workstream R1). ONE artifact: bundles the ATS3 compiler front-end with the vscode-languageserver loop; the prelude loads once at startup; each check reuses the warm compiler; didChange evicts the edited file + dependents from the compiler's per-file caches (env_reset over the_d{1,2,3}parenv).
